One habit, three wins

Your favourite podcast
is now your workout.

Mosey ties the thing you crave — the next episode — to the thing you keep meaning to do — move. The gate makes it automatic.

The Gate

Audio plays only while you're moving. Stop walking and the story stops — a gentle grace window keeps traffic lights forgiving. It's the whole idea, and it feels like magic.

Steps, not minutes

Episodes are measured in steps. Every session leaves an Echo — one ring per 100 steps, coloured by how you moved: walk, jog or run. Effort you can see.

Privacy by designPEACE

No account. No GPS. No location permission at all. Everything runs on your phone. Share a run without ever sharing where you live.

The core loop

Move to play.
Stop to pause.

Open an episode and start walking. The story flows and the rings ripple outward as your steps add up — coloured by your pace. The moment you stop, the audio fades and waits for you — no fumbling, no buttons.

  • Cadence-aware — walking, jogging and running are told apart on-device
  • Eyes-free haptics tell you the gate state, pocket or hand
  • Works on treadmills — it counts steps, not GPS
  • Adaptive Mode for wheelchair users — same gate, different motion
Your rhythm

A year you can
see and hold.

The whole year stacks into your Year Rings — one ring per month, coloured walk, jog or run. Filter by week, month or year and watch entertainment and fitness sit side by side: hours of story, steps, kilometres, pace.

  • Hours of story carried by your own two feet
  • Steps, distance, pace and running sessions in one place
  • Personal records — no leaderboards, no comparison anxiety
  • Healthy streaks: one rest day a week keeps your streak alive
Movement is contagious

See your circle move.
Catch the bug.

The Feed shows the Echoes your friends made this week — the shows they walked to, the distance they covered. Never their routes or locations. Just proof that people you know are out there moving, which turns out to be the best nudge there is.

Proof, not pressure.

Give a friend props for a strong week. Discover what your circle is actually listening to while they move. Get pulled off the couch by seeing someone else already out there — the friendly, quiet kind of motivation.

  • Weekly Echoes from people you follow
  • Discover shows through movement, not algorithms
  • Props and streaks — encouragement, never rankings
  • Zero location data in anything shared, ever
Coming soon

Listen Together.
Walk apart.

Press play at the same moment as everyone else. Sunday 9AM, the new episode drops and a whole group sets off — different streets, different cities, same story, same stride. A book club for your feet.

SUN · 9:00
Long Play Club · 6k steps

Morning Miles · fresh drops

Wind-Down Walk · easy pace

Good for you. Good, full stop.

The couch hours,
reclaimed.

The average listener sits still for six-plus hours of audio a week. Mosey turns that time into steps — measured against the WHO's 150 active minutes, celebrated when you hit it, never weaponised when you don't.

6h+
Weekly listening, now on foot

WHO active minutes, tracked

The privacy ledger

Motion. Never location.

Most fitness apps know exactly where you live because your routes start at your front door. Mosey is built so it structurally can't. Here's the whole list.

Never touched

GPS & location
Routes & maps
Ad tracking & identifiers
Your account — there isn't one
